category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a proxy CLI for capturing and inspecting HTTP(S) and WS(S) traffic; official GitHub repository describes a proxy CLI with TUI and WebUI.

docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface found for usage and project details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/sigoden/proxyfor, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names HTTP(S)/WS(S) capture and inspection; official repository description adds TUI and WebUI.
